Residential Asphalt Paving in Richmond VA

For over 40 years, J. Worden & Sons has been the trusted name in residential asphalt paving across Richmond, Chesterfield, and Henrico County. Whether you need a brand-new driveway, patio, or repairs to existing asphalt, our family-owned team delivers quality craftsmanship at honest prices.

Call for Free Estimate: (804) 446-1296

Why Choose Us for Residential Asphalt Paving?

40+ Years Experience

Fourth-generation family business with deep roots in Central Virginia. We know residential asphalt paving inside and out.

Licensed & Insured

Fully licensed and insured. Your home is in safe hands with a business that's been here for decades.

Free Estimates

No obligation. We'll inspect your property, answer your questions, and provide an honest, competitive quote.

Quality Guaranteed

Premium materials and proven installation methods. Your driveway will last for years to come.

Our Residential Asphalt Services

New Driveway Installation

We handle everything from grading and base preparation to final asphalt laying. A properly installed driveway lasts 15–20 years with regular maintenance.

Asphalt Repair & Patching

Potholes, cracks, and settling damage? We repair existing driveways quickly and affordably, extending the life of your asphalt.

Sealcoating

Protect your investment with regular sealcoating. It prevents water damage, UV fading, and extends your driveway's lifespan by 5+ years.

Residential Patios & Outdoor Spaces

Asphalt patios, walkways, and outdoor paving for entertaining and curb appeal.

Areas We Serve

Richmond | Chester | Chesterfield County | Henrico County | Glen Allen | Tuckahoe | Midlothian | Colonial Heights | Petersburg

Homeowner Testimonials

"Professional from start to finish." — We needed our driveway repaired after winter damage. J. Worden & Sons came out, assessed the damage, and completed the work ahead of schedule. Highly recommend.
"40+ years means they know what they're doing." — Family-owned businesses care about their reputation. We trusted them with our driveway installation and haven't regretted it.

Ready for Your Free Estimate?

Call (804) 446-1296 or fill out a quick form on our website. We'll schedule a time that works for you, inspect your property, and provide a transparent, no-pressure quote.

Get Your Free Estimate Today
